name: cashsnap_two_stage_v9_khr100_unknown_gate_browser_stack

evidence.summary: V9 is the current product-stack tie-breaker over V16. The active diagnostic policy adds USD_1/USD_50/USD_100 floors at 0.15 to the KHR floors: it improves the product hard slice to 64/79 exact-value and 3/22 background-FP images, improves strict-clean to 747/774 and 3/471, and cuts detector-only held-out unknown/true-empty FPs, while full-real exact-value drops from 1437 to 1434. Split gated stack check: foreign Asian falls to 3/184 images with FPs and KHR100 to 0/12, but USD2 remains 17/41. Diagnostic only; not production-promoted.

known_limits: Diagnostic current product clue only; not production-promoted.
The current 13-class detector schema still cannot count USD_2, KHR_100, KHR_200, or other missing official denominations as target classes.
The proposal gate rejects proposals but does not correct denomination classes or teach detector visible-evidence localization.
V9 still has partial-val precision and unknown/out-of-schema money tradeoffs; use the blended model scorecard before promotion.
USD2 remains a sizable missing-denomination leak in the gated stack at the current threshold.
